x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR case short descriptions are the primary NLP input for Now Assist HRSD classification and routing. Vague or templated short descriptions produce poor AI routing accuracy.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Train HR case creators to write specific, descriptive short descriptions. Add guidance text to the HR case creation form. Target: ≤5% of closed HR cases missing short descriptions in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c7f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c59
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR case short descriptions are the primary NLP input for Now Assist HRSD classification and routing. Vague or templated short descriptions produce poor AI routing accuracy.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Case Short Description Quality</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed HR cases found in the last 12 months. Short description quality cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('short_description', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var missingPct = total > 0 ? Math.round((missing / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = missing + ' of ' + total + ' closed HR cases missing short description (last 12 months, ' + missingPct + '%)';

    if (missingPct <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + missingPct + '% of closed HR cases are missing short descriptions. Now Assist HRSD has strong NLP input quality for AI classification and routing.'
        };
    } else if (missingPct <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed HR cases have no short description (' + missingPct + '% missing, target: ≤5%). Short descriptions are the primary NLP input for Now Assist HRSD classification and routing.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed HR cases missing short descriptions (' + missingPct + '%). Critical NLP input gap — Now Assist HRSD classification and AI routing accuracy will be significantly degraded.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000403</number><order>110</order><remediation_guidance>Train HR case creators to write specific, descriptive short descriptions. Add guidance text to the HR case creation form. Target: ≤5% of closed HR cases missing short descriptions in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>c7f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c59</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Case Short Description Quality</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c7f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c59</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
